Here is my comprehensive report of all model storage paths found in the codebase:

---

## Model Storage Paths — Organized by Script/Config

### 1. `.env` — API config only, no model paths
```
BASE_URL=https://yinli.one/v1
OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://yinli.one/v1
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
```
No model storage paths here.

---

### 2. Primary Artifact Root: `/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/`

This is the main model storage location on the Ocean filesystem. There are three sub-trees:

#### 2a. `artifacts/full_prefill_llama8b/` — Initial/preliminary finetuning experiments

Referenced by:
- `scripts/slurm/31_single_train.sh` (line 37):
  ```
  OUTPUT_DIR=/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/full_prefill_llama8b/$EXP_NAME
  ```
  Parameterized by `$EXP_NAME`. Produces:
  - `$OUTPUT_DIR/final_adapter/` (LoRA adapter)
  - `$OUTPUT_DIR/merged_model/` (merged LoRA model)
  - `$OUTPUT_DIR/best_model/` (Full FT model)

- `scripts/eval/31_train_and_eval_full_prefill.py` (line 32):
  ```python
  COMPARISON_ROOT = OCEAN_ROOT / "artifacts" / "full_prefill_llama8b"
  ```
  Experiments stored here:
  - `lora_fix498/` → `merged_model/`
  - `lora_wr2224/` → `merged_model/`
  - `ft_fix498/` → `best_model/`
  - `ft_wr2224/` → `best_model/`

- `scripts/slurm/40_base_1k_pipeline.sh` (line 166):
  ```
  OUTPUT_TRAIN=/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/full_prefill_llama8b/base_1k_lora
  ```
  Produces: `base_1k_lora/final_adapter/` and `base_1k_lora/merged_model/`

- `scripts/slurm/41_base_1k_round2.sh` (line 125):
  ```
  OUTPUT_TRAIN=/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/full_prefill_llama8b/base_1k_lora_r2
  ```
  Produces: `base_1k_lora_r2/final_adapter/` and `base_1k_lora_r2/merged_model/`

- `documents/data_augmentation_results.md` (line 180, section 6.5):
  All model artifacts under `.../artifacts/full_prefill_llama8b/`:
  | Experiment | Sub-path |
  |---|---|
  | ft_combined11k | `ft_combined11k/best_model/` |
  | lora_combined11k_v2 | `lora_combined11k_v2/merged_model/` |
  | ft_gpt4o_combined | `ft_gpt4o_combined/best_model/` |
  | lora_gpt4o_combined | `lora_gpt4o_combined/merged_model/` |

#### 2b. `artifacts/base_full/` — Full LEMMA dataset (14941 questions) iterative training

Referenced by:
- `scripts/slurm/50_base_full_r1.sh` (line 30):
  ```
  ARTIFACT_BASE=/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/base_full
  ```
  Round 1 model: `$ARTIFACT_BASE/r1_lora/merged_model/`

- `scripts/slurm/50b_base_full_r1_continue.sh` (line 30): Same `ARTIFACT_BASE`, same `r1_lora/` output.

- `scripts/slurm/51_base_full_r2_reject.sh` (line 30):
  ```
  R1_MODEL=/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/base_full/r1_lora/merged_model
  ```
  Uses R1 model for rejection sampling.

- `scripts/slurm/52_base_full_r2_train.sh` (line 30, 68):
  ```
  ARTIFACT_BASE=/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/base_full
  OUTPUT_TRAIN=$ARTIFACT_BASE/r2_lora
  ```
  Round 2 model: `$ARTIFACT_BASE/r2_lora/merged_model/`

#### 2c. `artifacts/comparison_llama8b/` — Preliminary comparison experiments

Referenced by `scripts/eval/29_train_and_eval_comparison.py` (line 36):
```python
COMPARISON_ROOT = OCEAN_ROOT / "artifacts" / "comparison_llama8b"
```
Experiments: `lora_lemma1k/`, `lora_prefill245/`, `lora_prefill50/`, `ft_lemma1k/`, `ft_prefill245/`, `ft_prefill50/`

---

### 3. Round 1 Model Used as Input for Round 2

- `scripts/slurm/41_base_1k_round2.sh` (line 29):
  ```
  R1_MODEL=/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/full_prefill_llama8b/base_1k_lora/merged_model
  ```

- `scripts/slurm/51_base_full_r2_reject.sh` (line 30):
  ```
  R1_MODEL=/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/base_full/r1_lora/merged_model
  ```

---

### 4. Training Script Model Save Logic

`scripts/data_prep/15_finetune_lemma.py` (lines 278-280):
```python
save_dir = output_dir / ("final_adapter" if args.method == "lora" else "best_model")
trainer.save_model(str(save_dir))
tokenizer.save_pretrained(str(save_dir))
```
Also saves `sweep_metrics.json` at `output_dir/sweep_metrics.json`.

---

### 5. Eval Output Paths (model-adjacent)

`scripts/slurm/30_lemma_eval_gsm8k.sh` (line 28):
```
OUTPUT_DIR="${MODEL_PATH}/math_eval/test_cot-meta-math_zero-shot"
```
Eval results are stored inside the model directory itself.

---

### 6. Log Storage

- `/jet/home/swang47/yang/projects/LostInTheSecond/logs/` — SLURM job logs
- `/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/logs/` — Eval logs

---

### Summary: All Concrete Model Paths

| Path | Type | Script(s) |
|---|---|---|
| `.../artifacts/full_prefill_llama8b/base_1k_lora/merged_model/` | LoRA merged (1K subset R1) | `40_base_1k_pipeline.sh` |
| `.../artifacts/full_prefill_llama8b/base_1k_lora_r2/merged_model/` | LoRA merged (1K subset R2) | `41_base_1k_round2.sh` |
| `.../artifacts/full_prefill_llama8b/ft_combined11k/best_model/` | Full FT | `31_single_train.sh`, docs |
